characters.name: Alligator
characters.description: Alligatoris another character from Skunk Fu Season 2. She may be really old but she is very wise, just likePanda. Plus they were both good friends toDragonfor a very long time. Maybe even more than a bazillion years ago. Now that's a really long time in the past. Alligator is also smart and strong she can almost use the most energy to fight the evil one and restore all the balance to the earth and the heavens. As much as she thinks she can muster for her own good thet is. Plus, just like Panda, she wants everybody and everything to balance well so the at inner peace. And stay at inner peace too.

characters.name: Anglerfish
characters.description: Anglerfish is a character on Skunk Fu and is a clever fish that can lure any fighter in his path. Lisa (wife) Scott (son)

characters.name: Baboon
characters.description: Resides Dragon's Mountain Position "Fox"- As shown in the episodes "The Art of Patience" and "The Art of the Crush" Baboon has a large crush on Fox, but she doesn't like him at all. He tries to make her join the Ninja army with unsuccessful results. "Dragon"- Baboon does not like Dragon at all. Nor does Dragon like him. The only reason Baboon will call him by "Master" or "My merciful one" is out of fear. It is seen through numerous episodes that he wants to take over and make Dragonhislackey, but he never will. He sometimes thinks about his relationship with Dragon, which makes Dragon angry. "Rabbit"- Both of them hate each other. Mainly because they are from enemy sides. However there are other reasons. Rabbit also likes Fox so they rival over her affections. Both of them are power hungry people. When they clash, it's anything but pretty. "Skunk"- Baboon barely has respect for Skunk and often attempts to defeat Skunk, only for Baboon to fail. While Skunk is mostly afraid of Baboon, he will often pick on him behind his back. "Ninja Monkeys"- Baboon thinks of them as stupid and blames them for all their failed invasions on the valley. Though in several episodes it is shown that he does care about the Ninja Monkeys and does need them to beanything.Such examples are shown in "The Art of the Tea Ceremony" and "The Art of Monkeying Around".

characters.description: Batareo is a rare,but mysterious grey-headed mega bat and recently new antagonist in Skunk Fu and a basically is the mentor to Dragon, a once kind creature whose Heaven descended him in deep in theMountain. Theodore (father) Keanu Reeves(Soul Brother)

characters.name: Batrivian
characters.description: Batrivian is a firm and further serious bat and is the loyal enforcer of the Overlord. He's a very industrious bat with a very busy body nature when comes making sure that any animals (often as well as his brother Vengerius)in line. Batrivian wears a white shirt. He wears an orange & purple striped tie. He's a very industrious bat with a very busy body nature when comes making sure that any animals (often as well as his brother Vengerius)in line. characters.name: Beaver
characters.description: Beaver is Skunk's old childhood friend and a character on Skunk Fu. His father, Fire Dojo Master, have stripped of his belt, due to the fact that he was secretly joining the Overlord and Dragon of burning the forest. Swearing revenge, Beaver have taken up his father's mantle and caught the attention of his father's black cloaked figure, The Overlord.

characters.name: Bird
characters.description: Bird is a male bird. It is assumed he is not a warrior due to his lack of interest and hardwork. He is characterized as lazy (likeSkunk), sneaky and sleepy. Bird can often be found onOx's back. He,Ox andskunkare good friends and hang out often. He also has a New York accent. He is age 30 Old Version 2 Ben (father)

characters.name: Black Wolf
characters.description:
Grey Wolf(or often otherwise known as the the Black Wolf) is a vicious warrior with a total strategies and cunning skills.
He is one of Dragon's commander and Fox's father's only rival. He's the father of the 3 wolf ninja and a very formidable opponent. His fur are timberwolf-gray and in midnight, he's jet black. His mouth got curved sharp canine fangs; needle sharp. His left side of his eyes is glowing yellow while the other is glass blue with a scar. He's very muscular and got a long wagging tail. Black Wolf also wears some blue overalls.

characters.name: Blinky
characters.description: Blinky is a glowing little firely who first appeared in the TV series, Skunk Fu!. Blinky is really friendly and doesn't really talk when he first made an appearance and first met Skunk.. In "The Art of Responsibility", Blinky was Skunk's friend and his pet in the past, though the fireflies view it as Skunk being his pet. He cannot talk, like mature fireflies, so he communicates with a series of beeps, which Skunk used to his advantage in games. He helped end the Ninja Monkeys' night raids by lighting up the Valley as a defense. He made cameo appearances in several other later episodes.

characters.name: Cat
characters.description: Cat is another one the new characters who appeared in Season 2 of Skunk Fu. Cat is very strong, smart, cute, tough, huggale, generous, has three whiskers on each side of her face, has yellow-green eyes, a pink nose, and is almost the same age as Skunk, Dog, Gorilla and the other kids in the valley. Just like Sheep, Squirrel, and Elephant, she loves to sing, laugh, play and dance and they all have something in coomon, they like to help each other out as far as saving the valley animals from danger. Plus, Cat and her best friends are all innocent really knows how to have fun and be adventurous no matter what they do or where they go in the world around them hoping that eveybody in the Earth and the Heavens can be at peace. She is age 19 old just like Fox.

characters.name: Chipmunk
characters.description: Chipmunk is another Skunk Fu! charcter from Season 2. He is like a brother because he's caring and fun-loving. Chipmunk is another close friend of Skunk and he and Squirrel do so much to help out because they're both equally adventurous and want to do everything Skunk does Sometimes Chipmunk just wants the valley to be as happy as the earth and heavens can be and would hate for anyone or anything to back down on all the fun and adventure that always lies ahead. Plus, Just like Squirrel, Chipmunk has a blushy tail but it's light brown all over his fur and has a white stripe on each side while Skunk only has his one white stripe in the middle of his black tail.Chipmunk may be different from the other kids but he is still as fun, caring, and adventurous as they are especially when he and Squirrel both want to help save the valley from danger and harm like all real kung fu heroes do best. It's something Chipmunk always dreamed of doing when was little and starting to grow up over the years in the valley.

characters.name: Cody Coyote (Non-Canon Original Character)
characters.description: Cody Coyote is a non-canonical Skunk Fu character in most skunkfufoxlover52 fanfiction. He was born on November 8, 1970 in Berlin Germany.  As mentioned above, Cody Coyote was born in Berlin Germany, but moved to Valley when he was a six-year-old. He lived in Xiaotian Qi (a neighboring city of the Valley) most of his life.

characters.name: Cody Coyote (Non-Canon Original Character)
characters.description: Cody Coyote is a non-canonical Skunk Fu character in most skunkfufoxlover52 fanfiction. He was born on November 8, 1970 in Berlin Germany.  As mentioned above, Cody Coyote was born in Berlin Germany, but moved to Valley when he was a six-year-old. He lived in Xiaotian Qi (a neighboring city of the Valley) most of his life.

characters.name: Crane
characters.description: Craneserves as the Valley's aerial scout and reconnaissance. She is also a member of theFan-Fan Warriors, the Valley Elders, and a seasoned fighter in her own right. CraneAge50SpeciesCraneSexFemaleVoiced ByJules de Jongh Crane's most notable trait is that she loves to gossip. Though there's truth in her stories, as seen in the Art of the Noseblow where she's the first to spread the story that Skunk's "new move" had gotten Baboon exiled. In the same episode however, she's seen repeating the same rumor passed to her from Tiger onto Mantis, this time adding that Skunk also "found a cure for hiccups!"

characters.name: Crocodile
characters.description: Crocodile is another character from Skunk Fu! Season 2 and she is a relative of Alligator. Crocodile is looking right forward to living her inner life in peace, joy, and love just all good valley animals (of every age, color, patter, pattern, shape, and size) do best in the earth and the heavens.

characters.name: Dark Animals
characters.description:
Dark Animals(orDragon's Cult)is an ancient troop of various creature who were dedicated their skills of over throwing the Valley.
Dark Skunk and the Overlord Emperor  sent the highly intelligent species to attack the Valley and supporting theNinja Monkeysto aid their goal.

characters.name: Dragon
characters.description: DragonAge59SpeciesChinese DragonSexMaleVoiced ByRod GoodallAffiliationThe Ice Mountain,Ninja monkeysPositionLeader ofDragon's Army,Baboon's master, former Valley Guardian,Batareo's ApprenticeTitlesDragon, Master Dragon, Master, Oversized Gecko, Campire with Legs, Dirty Rat (Skunk).Arts KnownDark Arts "You've made your final blunder"- Dragon inThe Art of Wu-Shu Dragonis the supreme leader of Baboon and the Ninja Monkeys as well as the main antagonist of the Skunk Fu franchise. He is a black and white Chinese Dragon capable of breathing fire. He is the only character on the show that features a pair of glowing white eyes. Dragon is diabolical and extremely hateful. Yet in the main back story, he was once a protagonist.

characters.name: Eagle
characters.description: Eagle is another Skunk Fu character and is really good at seeing and hearing She's a very close friend of Hawk and they both know exaclty when and where to strike at any time or place. Plus, Eagle just looks like she's bald but she 's not really bald, even though she has lots and lots of white and brown feathers all over her body.

characters.name: Elephant
characters.description: Elephant is one of the first characters in Skunk Fu! Season 2. That cute,cuddly, happy pink fellow made a great special guest appearance in the episode, The Art of Luck from Season 1. She appeared again in other episodes in Season 2. Elephant is a really true friend to Skunk, Squirrel, Chipmunk, Cat, Dog, Mouse, Sheep, and lots of valley animal kids. Plus they all have more than a lot in common. Elephant also like to have fun and be adventurous, even though she feels shy and has a natural sensitive side. She is almost as sensitive as Sheep when they met each other for the first time in the Valley. But they both love to sing and dance just like all good Valley animal kids do best.Along with everybody else that in the Resistance that is.

characters.name: Epi
characters.description: Epiis a femaleNinja Monkeythat appeared briefly in the episodeThe art of monkey love. She  was part of a unable-to-work trap in an attempt to captureSkunk. The two did become friends, and Epi helped Skunk escape his fellowNinja Monkeys. It is possible because of her interferencesat the monkey duisgused as epi was punished or something as a result. Laura (mother) Baby Kyle (baby brother)

characters.name: Flamingo
characters.description: Flamingo isanother one of the new Skunk Fu characters and is always prepared and never gives up on anything or anyone in the whole Valley. She is a close friend that lives next to Swan. She has pink featthers all over her body,and Swan only has white feathers just like Crane. Flamingo and Swan both have beautiful singing voices, are talented dancers and just like, Duck, Fox, Crane and Skunk, even though he's a boy, they are a perfect fan fighting team and maketrue new members of the Fan-Fan Warriors. Plus Flamingo is getting to Crane, Duck and Swan so well that she knows what to say and who to say it to. That way the whole Valley will have better understaing and all the animals on the Earth and in the Heavens will surely and truely be most unsterandable so they can all live better life in love, joy and peace thruoghout the entire universe.

characters.name: Fox
characters.description: FoxAge19SpeciesFoxSexFemaleResidesThe ValleyVoiced ByPatricia RodriguezEnemiesNinja MonkeysPositionWarriorAliasFoxy LadyAlliesSkunk,Rabbit(love interest/boyfriend),PandaSkunketteCatBaoFamilyUnnamed FatherAppears inSkunk fu! Foxis a main character inSkunk Fu!. She is the fan-fan and the warrior ofThe Valleyand one ofPanda’s members. She is graceful, well, respected, albeit tough warrior inThe Valley. Fox is a beautiful vixen who stands at a tall height, especially when next toSkunkandRabbit. She has auburn colored fur, big green eyes that are almond shaped and framed with eyelashes, and an athletic but curvaceous figure. As seen in the '''Skunk Fu!''' series, Fox is seen as the calm, collected, clever, charming, graceful, wise, strategic, as well as a tough warrior in The Valley.

characters.name: Goanna
characters.description: Goanna is a very cunning, but slightly intimidating australian lizard and is the apprentice ofDragonandBaboon. He is one of the deadliest foe ever and is consider as a very serious fighter as well as he's cunning. Goanna is one of the most cunning warrior of Dragon and he's clever and agile. Goanna is a male goanna. He wears some blue overalls. He is one of the deadliest foe ever and is consider as a very serious fighter as well as he's cunning. characters.name: Goat
characters.description: Goat is another new Skunk Fu! character in Season 2 and is an older relative than Sheep and a little shorter than Horse. Plus, Goat is trying really hard to keep everything at peace without any problems or mistakes in the valley because she knows what she's doing considering who she is and such.

characters.name: Goose
characters.description: Goose is another character from Skunk Fu! Season 2 and is also a relative of Swan and a good friend of Duck and Crane and Flamingo. too. She would do anything to kkep the valley safe,warm, healthy, and happy. As far as balancing the earth and the hevans that is.

characters.name: Gorilla
characters.description: Gorilla is a character in Skunk Fu and is one of the Four Kings of Dragons army. Horase (father) Lisa (mother)

characters.name: Grasshopper
characters.description: Grasshopper is another one of the newest Skunk Fu! characters and she is very jumpy. Grasshopper is a close friend of Praying mantis and live right next to his territory. She also wants to live life in the valley at love, joy and peace like all good kunkg fu warriors do best.
